scenario_name: Scenario 11 — Floating Point in Financial Calculation
justification: All rubric criteria met: floating-point issue identified as Critical with bank transfer context emphasized; specific numerical example provided (0.1 + 0.2, 80+ deliveries compounding); fix recommends both integer cents and decimal library; NaN propagation from null/undefined DB fields explicitly called out as Critical; safe_to_deploy is false; distinction from display-only context is implicit in the severity elevation and repeated emphasis on 'sent to the bank'.

observations.text: Floating-point identified as Critical with clear explanation of accumulation across deliveries and commission compounding
Concrete reproduction examples provided (0.1 + 0.2, basePay=12.10 chained 80 times)
Fix covers both integer cents (Math.round * 100) and decimal library (dinero.js/big.js)
NaN propagation from null DB fields identified as Critical with typeof NaN === 'number' nuance
safe_to_deploy is false with strong rationale about irreversibility of incorrect bank transfers
Bonus finding: negative payout guard is a legitimate additional critical issue
No explicit contrast with display-only context (scenario 02), though the severity elevation to Critical and repeated bank transfer emphasis implicitly makes the distinction
